title: Does monday JS sdk maintain rate limit responses?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am using monday’s JS SDK to do api calls. Should I have a concern to maintain rate limit errors or does the SDK mange these rate limiting problems on behalf of me? 
Thanks

posts.author: apsimos (Zeitnot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am using monday’s JS SDK to do api calls. Should I have a concern to maintain rate limit errors or does the SDK mange these rate limiting problems on behalf of me?

Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @apsimos,

The rate limits apply when using the API via the SDK so you need to manage it on your end

Cheers,
Matias
